name: German IT Law & GDPR
description_en: First-pass assessments on German IT law and GDPR (DSGVO)—data protection, contracts, terms (AGB), Impressum, cookies, NIS2, and the EU AI Act—for DE/EU questions. Explicitly not legal advice.
description_zh: 针对德国/欧盟问题,对德国 IT 法与 GDPR(DSGVO)做初步评估——数据保护、合同、条款(AGB)、Impressum、Cookie、NIS2 与欧盟 AI 法案。明确声明非法律意见。
long_en: Analyzes your documents and gives structured orientation as a first step before engaging a lawyer, in the same vein as other regional legal skills in the catalog.
long_zh: 分析你的文档并给出结构化的初步指引,作为正式委托律师前的第一步,与目录中其它地区性法务技能同族。
sec_note_en: Provides general legal orientation only, not legal advice under the German RDG; consult a licensed lawyer before acting, and handle the documents you share as confidential.
sec_note_zh: 仅提供一般性法律指引,并非德国 RDG 意义上的法律意见;行动前请咨询持牌律师,并将你分享的文档按机密处理。
